control_panel.title: Admin Control Panel

backups.title: Automated Backups

purge.no_enabled_calendars: No enabled/generated milestone calendars to purge.

backups.backup_configuration_description: Configure destinations, schedule windows, and retention strategy.

restore.label: Restore
restore.dry_run_description: Dry run only (preview changes without writing data)
restore.replace_warning: Replace mode deletes existing owner resources in scope before restore.

dry_run.confirm: Run backup restore dry-run? No data will be modified.
dry_run.confirm_replace: Replace mode will delete existing calendars/address books for owners included in the archive before restoring. Continue?
dry_run.confirm_merge: Run backup restore in merge mode?

admin.delete_user_confirmation: This action permanently removes the account.
admin.reset_user_2fa: Reset this user's 2FA enrollment and revoke their DAV app passwords?

admin.transfer_ownership_description: If selected, ownership of calendars, address books, and contacts will transfer before deletion.
admin.confirm_email: Type your account email to confirm this deletion.

api.transferred_data: Deleted {{deletedUserName}} and transferred {{transferredCalendars}} calendar(s), {{transferredAddressBooks}} address book(s), and {{transferredContacts}} contact(s) to {{transferTargetName || 'the selected owner'}}.
